{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ayana's shears
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ayana]] can use her shears despite the knives growing from her fingers.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
